data.title: Expion360 (XPON) shares surge 42% after hours to $1.28 on $9.6 million revenue, nearly double yearly metric improvement.
data.description: Shares of Expion360 Inc. (NASDAQ: XPON) surged 41.97% in after-hours trading, reaching $1.28, following the release of its preliminary unaudited financial results for the year ended December 31, 2025. During the regular session, XPON closed at $0.90, marking a 5.33% increase. The company reported substantial year-over-year growth, with revenue nearly doubling from $5.6 million in 2024 to $9.6 million in 2025. Gross profit also rose significantly from $1.2 million to $2.2 million. Additionally, the cash balance soared from $0.5 million to $3.0 million. Despite these positive developments, Expion360 anticipates a net loss of around $6.2 million for 2025, an improvement from the $13.5 million loss incurred in 2024. Looking ahead to 2026, Chief Executive Officer Joseph Hammer expressed optimism about the company's expansion plans. For more details, refer to the full story on benzinga.com.

data.description: The recent Bitcoin price surges are unable to be sustained due to a lack of adequate buying interest. Glassnode's assessment indicates that crucial metrics will play a significant role in determining the next stage of Bitcoin's price growth.

data.title: SEC clarifies tokenized securities as issuer or third-party models: blockchain format doesn't bypass securities law.
data.description: Tokenized securities in the US are now classified by regulators as either issuer-sponsored or third-party models, with the blockchain format not exempting assets from federal securities law. This definition aims to bring clarity to the emerging sector, ensuring compliance with regulations and providing a framework for the growing market of digital assets. The distinction is crucial for companies and investors navigating this space, with the guidance helping to establish a clearer understanding of the regulatory environment. This move underscores the importance of adherence to securities laws in the rapidly expanding realm of tokenized assets, indicating a shift towards more formalized structures in the digital securities market.

data.title: Tesla will cease Model S, Model X production & shift to autonomous vehicles including Cybertruck. Over 730,000 units delivered since 2012.
data.description: During Tesla's Q4 earnings call, CEO Elon Musk announced that Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) will discontinue production of the Model S and Model X. Musk stated that the company will halt production of the vehicles next quarter, marking the end of the premium offerings. Since their launch in 2012 and 2016, Tesla has delivered approximately 730,000 to 740,000 units of both models. The Fremont, California facility will now shift its production focus to the Optimus humanoid robot as Tesla moves towards an autonomous future. Musk also revealed plans to transition the Cybertruck into a "fully autonomous line" in the future.

data.title: Infosys partners with Tennis Australia to enhance fan engagement at Australian Open 2026 with AI innovations.
data.description: Increasing fan involvement through advanced technology, including Rally, an AI mascot, and MatchFeel, a tactile feature for the visually impaired, was highlighted at a recent event in Melbourne, Australia on Jan. 29, 2026. Infosys (NSE: INFY) (BSE: INFY) (NYSE: ...) led the initiative to provide enhanced experiences for fans. The event emphasized using innovation to engage fans and included demonstrations of the new technologies aimed at creating a more inclusive environment.

data.title: Pepperstone wins four major global awards, including Overall Best Forex Broker of 2026. Leading online broker.
data.description: In Melbourne, Australia, on January 29th, 2026, Pepperstone, a global CFD provider, began the year on a high note by securing four prestigious international awards. This achievement solidified their position as a top online broker. Among the accolades received was the honor of being named the Overall Best Forex Broker for the year 2026, highlighting their exceptional performance in the industry. This success serves as a testament to Pepperstone's dedication to excellence and quality service.

data.title: Donald Trump Jr. celebrates World Liberty Financial's stablecoin hitting $5 billion market cap, showcasing success of USD1.
data.description: Donald Trump Jr., a co-founder of World Liberty Financial, expressed excitement as the dollar-pegged World Liberty Financial USD (USD1) stablecoin soared to a $5 billion market capitalization on Wednesday. Trump Family celebrates USD1's Success as Trump Jr. shared a CoinMarketCap screenshot to showcase the milestone. Emphasizing its American roots and real-world scalability, Trump Jr. credited the stablecoin's success to a focus on infrastructure rather than distractions. He tweeted, "USD1 just hit a $5B market cap. Crafted in America, primed for global utilization, and embraced by reputable entities." Eric Trump, Trump Jr.'s brother and co-founder, also commemorated the milestone. Further details are available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Xsolla SPAC 1 priced $200M IPO with 20M units at $10 each, trading on Nasdaq under symbol "XSLLU" from Jan 29, 2026.
data.description: Xsolla SPAC 1, a special purpose acquisition company, has priced its initial public offering of 20,000,000 units at $10.00 per unit. Each unit includes one Class A ordinary share and one-half of one redeemable warrant; the whole warrant can be exercised for one share at $11.50. Trading on Nasdaq under ticker symbol "XSLLU" begins January 29, 2026. After separation, Class A shares and warrants will trade under symbols "XSLL" and "XSLLW." The offering is set to close on January 30, 2026, pending usual conditions.
